---
title: "Instructor Only: Counts And Ordering Practice"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("../../../.."))
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
```

# Worked Reference

```{r}
census <- read_csv("data/real/census_state_race_ethnicity_long.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

category_population <- census |>
  group_by(race_ethnicity) |>
  summarize(total_population = sum(race_ethnicity_population), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(race_ethnicity = reorder(race_ethnicity, total_population))

ggplot(category_population, aes(x = race_ethnicity, y = total_population)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Included Population By Race/Ethnicity Category",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Population count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
